title: tina houses bloom open
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target. Preserve Tina exactly, including face, hair, wardrobe, position, Peelerz product, car interior, and camera. Image 2 is identity and candy support only. Through the window, ordinary houses along the Los Angeles street are blooming open like enormous tropical flowers. Roofs lift as architectural petals and interior rooms unfold into luminous gardens. The nearest house is still closed, the next is mid-bloom, and the far house is fully open, creating a visible progression toward the car. Photoreal architecture blended with botanical impossibility, rich greens and mango gold, elegant and benign, no destruction, no candyland, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
